hero.caption: // SOFTWARE DEVELOPER
hero.name: Reny Mireles
hero.description: Self-taught software developer passionate about building robust products. I love exploring complex technologies and turning problems into efficient solutions, from the backend to the user experience.

badges.available: Looking for my first formal role ✦

about.label: // ABOUT
about.title: About me
about.bio: My programming journey has been 100% self-taught. My curiosity to understand how things work has led me to explore everything from mobile development to distributed systems design. I don't have a traditional background, but I make up for it by building real projects, studying complex architectures, and writing code I can be proud of. I'm currently looking for my first full-time professional role to add value and keep growing.
about.status: Looking for my first formal role
about.focus_title: Learning by building and solving real problems with clean code.
focus_points: Designing scalable architectures by exploring modern technologies.
Developing fullstack products that balance performance with user experience.
Building cross-platform applications focused on solving real needs.

projects.empty_gallery: This project is better explained by its architecture and scope than by a visual gallery.

kumoriya.subtitle: Real-time cross-platform content aggregation engine
kumoriya.description: A 3-layer distributed system built around a plugin-first architecture. It unifies multiple content sources through dynamic indexing, metadata normalization and edge computing, with a strong focus on scalability, extensibility and cross-platform UX.
points: Plugin-first architecture (10+ source plugins, 18+ resolver plugins) that makes new content sources easier to integrate.
LWW CRDT synchronization (periodic push/pull) and real-time WebSockets + Durable Objects for Watch Parties.
Modern security with WebAuthn/Passkeys and Ed25519 for JWT signing.

pos.description: Comprehensive point-of-sale system featuring inventory management, customer tracking, and role-based analytical dashboards.

mybooktrace.description: Cross-platform mobile application for tracking reading habits with efficient local data persistence.

matrix.title: Matrixezz
matrix.description: Educational tool for solving complex matrix theorems by delegating algorithmic calculations to the server.

kumoriya.title: Kumoriya
kumoriya.subtitle: Real-time cross-platform content aggregation engine.
kumoriya.overview: Platform designed to unify fragmented content sources into a seamless native experience. It stands out for integrating a Flutter client, a Go backend, and real-time edge processing.
kumoriya.context: Flagship project demonstrating the ability to design complex distributed systems.
kumoriya.stack: Flutter, Dart, Go, Fiber, Cloudflare Workers, Durable Objects, PostgreSQL, Redis, FCM, Sentry, Docker.
kumoriya.delivery: Android/Windows client, RESTful API, and real-time edge services.
highlights: Plugin-based architecture (10+ source plugins, 18+ resolver plugins) and monorepo with 45+ Dart packages.
LWW CRDT data synchronization with periodic push/pull, and real-time WebSockets + Durable Objects for Watch Parties.
Modern security implementation with WebAuthn/Passkeys and Ed25519 JWT signing.
OTA update mechanism, internationalization (ARB files), and ExoPlayer native bindings (Kotlin).
kumoriya_matching engine for title normalization acting as an ETL on the mobile client.
Test coverage with over 65 test files.
kumoriya.gallery_note: Technical architecture and detailed documentation are available in the repository.

pos.title: POS System
pos.subtitle: Commercial management system optimized for daily operations.
pos.overview: Comprehensive platform that unifies sales, inventory, and customer management. Designed to streamline business operations through a fast interface, clear workflows, and a modular architecture with vertical feature slices.
pos.context: Fullstack web application aimed at solving B2B business needs.
pos.stack: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Radix UI, Zod.
pos.delivery: Responsive web application with an admin panel and user roles.
highlights: Implementation of Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for administrators and sales staff.
Data export with ExcelJS/jsPDF and keyboard shortcuts for mouse-less operation.
Data visualization with Nivo/Recharts for analytical reporting.

finwise.title: Finwise
finwise.subtitle: Financial dashboard focused on user experience and data visualization.
finwise.overview: Personal finance management platform focused on visual clarity and usability. Implements session management, budget tracking, and goal setting in a clear interface.
finwise.context: Fullstack project demonstrating skills in UX/UI and layered architecture.
finwise.stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Prisma, PostgreSQL, React Context.
finwise.delivery: Web application with a private dashboard and metrics visualization.
highlights: Layered structure (repositories, services, controllers, providers) for clear separation of concerns.
Seamless integration of transaction, budget, and financial goal modules.

mybooktrace.title: MyBookTrace
mybooktrace.subtitle: Mobile application for tracking reading habits and personal progress.
mybooktrace.overview: Application designed to offer a seamless user experience in logging reading sessions. It features a local-first architecture, ensuring optimal performance and offline availability.
mybooktrace.context: Demonstration of cross-platform mobile development with a focus on performance and UX.
mybooktrace.stack: Flutter, Dart, Provider, Go Router, SQLite, FL Chart.
mybooktrace.delivery: Mobile application with local data persistence and statistics visualization.
highlights: Layered architecture with separation of concerns (presentation, repositories, services).
Implementation of a local database (SQLite) for an offline-first experience.
Data visualization with FL Chart and navigation using Go Router.

matrix.title: Matrixezz
matrix.subtitle: Educational platform for solving complex matrix operations.
matrix.overview: Tool developed for a real academic environment, capable of solving advanced mathematical theorems. Delegates algorithmic calculations to the backend to ensure numerical precision and separation of concerns, keeping the client lightweight.
matrix.context: Project highlighting skills in backend development, algorithms, and team collaboration.
matrix.stack: Java, Spring Boot, Maven, HTML, SCSS, JavaScript.
matrix.delivery: RESTful API in Java with a web client for step-by-step result visualization.
highlights: Implementation of complex mathematical algorithms (Gauss, Gauss-Jordan, determinants) on the server.
Flag system (Locked, Process Inclusion, Fatal Error, Warning) for improved UX/DX.
Collaborative development focused on solving a specific educational need.

items.description: Developed an internal platform for inventory and operational request management as an independent paid project. I handled the architecture design and fullstack implementation.
items.note: Impact: Digitized internal processes, improving resource management efficiency for the institution.
